query:
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.skillSet, 
  CASE WHEN dd.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasDetails,
  CASE WHEN dv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as hasVideo
FROM drills d 
LEFT JOIN drillDetails dd ON d.id = dd.drillId 
LEFT JOIN drillVideos dv ON d.id = dv.drillId 
ORDER BY hasDetails, hasVideo
LIMIT 100;
